ingredients: semolina puri:30g,boiled potato:200g,black chickpeas:150g,mint:20g,cilantro:20g,green chili:5g,tamarind chutney:80g,chaat masala:5g,black salt:3g,cumin powder:3g,lemon juice:20ml,cold water:500ml
